title: Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple
tagline: Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Narasingam is a village located 8 km from Madurai on the road to Melur, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Narasingam is a village located 8 km from Madurai on the road to Melur, in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is named for the nearby cave temple dedicated to Yoga Narasimha Perumal, at the foot of the Yanaimalai hills. This temple was constructed in 770 CE by Madurakavi alias Marankaari who was the minister of the Madurai King Parantaka Nedunjadaiyan. There is a front mandapam (court).

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Yanaimalai
topPlaces.description: Yanaimalai (Elephant Hill) is a protected monument and tourist attraction in Tamil Nadu, India. It has Jain sculptures, a Shaivite temple, and a Vaishnavite temple, namely the Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple.

topPlaces.name: Othakadai
topPlaces.description: Othakadai is a panchayat town in Madurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Thirumohoor Kalamegaperumal temple
topPlaces.description: The Thirumohoor Kalamegaperumal Temple (also known as Thirumohoor or Tirumogoor temple) is a Hindu temple near Melur, Madurai district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu, is dedicated to the Hindu god Vishnu. Constructed in the Dravidian style of architecture, the temple is glorified in the Nalayira Divya Prabandham, the early medieval Tamil canon of the Alvar saints from the 6th–9th centuries CE. It is one of the 108 Divya Desams dedicated to Vishnu, who is worshipped as Kalamega Perumal and his consort Lakshmi as Mohanavalli Thayar.

topPlaces.name: Thirumohur
topPlaces.description: Thirumohur is a neighbourhood in Madurai district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. Thirumohur is located at an altitude of about 162 m above the mean sea level with the geographical coordinates of 9.949700°N 78.207000°E / 9.949700; 78.207000.

topPlaces.name: Ilandaikulam
topPlaces.description: Ilandaikulam is a village in Madurai district, India. It is about 2 km (1.2 mi) from Maatuthavani bus stand.

topPlaces.name: Kannadendal
topPlaces.description: Kannadendal is a census town in Madurai district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Karuppayurani
topPlaces.description: Karuppayurani is a neighbourhood in Madurai district of Tamil Nadu state in the peninsular India. Karuppayurani is located at an altitude of about 188 m above the mean sea level with the geographical coordinates of 9.9329°N 78.1778°E / 9.9329; 78.1778.

topPlaces.name: Mattuthavani
topPlaces.description: Mattuthavani is a neighborhood on the outskirts of Madurai city in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (18 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (9 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Narasingam Yoga Narasimha Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Yanaimalai, Othakadai, Thirumohoor Kalamegaperumal temple, Thirumohur, Ilandaikulam.
